evals.name: explicit-spec-file-command
evals.expected_output: Skill orchestrates full SDD cycle: generates tests, runs them (red phase), generates implementation, runs tests again (green phase), reports final pass count and next steps. Should show clear success/failure signal and file changes.

evals.name: natural-language-spec-selection
evals.prompt: Run the SDD workflow for the payment service. Generate tests that validate the payment creation endpoint, then implement the endpoint to pass those tests.
evals.expected_output: Skill infers spec file from context, generates tests for payment creation (POST /payments endpoint), runs them, generates implementation code, validates with test suite. Shows which files were created and final test results.

evals.name: workflow-with-test-failures
evals.prompt:
/sdd-workflow payment-service.spec.md

Generate tests that are intentionally strict (e.g., require field validation for all payment fields) and then generate code to pass them.
evals.expected_output: Skill runs full workflow. If generated code doesn't pass all tests, it stops and reports which tests failed, why they failed, and suggests next steps (e.g., 'Add validation for X field', 'Review generated code in PaymentValidator.cs'). Clear diagnostics for user to debug.
